title: Authority of supporter
doc_html:
§4261.202. Authority of supporter

            A supporter may exercise the authority granted to the supporter in the supported decisionmaking agreement.

            Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
doc_text:
§4261.202.  Authority of supporter
A supporter may exercise the authority granted to the supporter in the supported
decisionmaking agreement.
Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
